header.sub_project: I already know this project's plan — I'll ask only about what's missing.
header.sub_supplement: I'll read what you've written and ask only about what's missing.
header.sub_new: No meeting notes? No problem. Answer a few questions and I'll put them together for you.
header.restart_confirm: Clear the whole conversation and start over?

input.placeholder: Type your answer… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line)

error.generic: Something went wrong during the AI interview. Please try again in a moment.

entry.title_fill: AI reads what you've written and asks only about what's missing to fill it in
entry.title_start: No meeting notes? OK — AI draws out the essentials with a few questions and organizes them into notes
entry.undo_title: Reverts to the content before merging the interview
entry.merged_with_draft: Merged what the conversation added into your existing content. Review and save. (You can revert if you like.)
entry.merged_no_draft: Organized the conversation into meeting notes. Review and save.
